fields.sandhi: 连读变调 (tone sandhi) list: [{ text, rule, base, read, value, markChange, where, zh, en }]. rule ∈ 上上变调 / 半上声 / 半去声 / 一字变调 / 不字变调. base = 本调 pinyin, read = 实际读音 pinyin, value = 实际调值 (35/211/53/51). markChange=true when the pinyin tone mark itself changes (上上变调/一/不); markChange=false for 调值-only refinements (半上声 211, 半去声 53) where spelling is unchanged. Computed over each line and the title as separate prosodic units (a unit-final 上声/去声 keeps its full citation tone). 半去声 only applies within a 2-syllable foot, never across the caesura/foot boundary. 'where' is the containing line, or 题目 for the title. Empty array = 全诗按本调朗读.
fields.tags: theme tags: array of category keys (multi-label, central themes only). Definitions in poems/categories.json.

lines.pinyin: chuí ruí yǐn qīng lù
lines.zh: 蝉垂下像帽缨一样的触角，吸饮着清澈的露水。
lines.en: Lowering its hat-tassel-like feelers, the cicada sips the clear dew.

lines.pinyin: liú xiǎng chū shū tóng
lines.zh: 连绵的鸣声从枝叶稀疏的梧桐树间传出。
lines.en: Its flowing song issues from the sparse paulownia trees.

lines.pinyin: jū gāo shēng zì yuǎn
lines.zh: 因为身居高处，声音自然能传得很远，
lines.en: Perched high, its voice naturally carries far,

lines.pinyin: fēi shì jiè qiū fēng
lines.zh: 并不是凭借秋风的吹送。
lines.en: and not because it relies on the autumn wind.

chars.zh: 古人帽带打结后下垂的部分，此指蝉的触须。

background.zh: 虞世南是初唐名臣、书法家，此诗借蝉自喻品格。
background.en: Yu Shinan was an Early Tang statesman and calligrapher; the poem uses the cicada as a self-portrait of character.

culture.zh: 古人认为蝉栖高饮露，象征品行高洁。
culture.en: Ancients saw the cicada, perched high and drinking dew, as a symbol of noble purity.

rhetoric.zh: 托物言志，以蝉居高声远比喻立身高洁自能声名远播。
rhetoric.en: An object-borrowing allegory: the high-perched cicada's far-reaching voice stands for how integrity alone wins lasting renown.

sandhi.zh: "饮"是上声，在非上声"清"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：yǐn。
sandhi.en: 饮 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 清; the written pinyin stays yǐn.

sandhi.zh: "响"是上声，在非上声"出"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：xiǎng。
sandhi.en: 响 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 出; the written pinyin stays xiǎng.

lines.pinyin: qī xī jīn xiāo kàn bì xiāo
lines.zh: 七夕的今夜，人们仰望着碧蓝的天空。
lines.en: On this Qixi night, people gaze up at the azure sky.

lines.pinyin: qiān niú zhī nǚ dù hé qiáo
lines.zh: 牛郎和织女正渡过天河上的鹊桥相会。
lines.en: The Cowherd and the Weaving Maid cross the bridge over the Milky Way.

lines.pinyin: jiā jiā qǐ qiǎo wàng qiū yuè
lines.zh: 家家户户都在向织女乞求巧艺，仰望着秋天的明月。
lines.en: Every household begs for skill, gazing at the autumn moon.

lines.pinyin: chuān jìn hóng sī jǐ wàn tiáo
lines.zh: 穿过的红丝线已有几万条之多。
lines.en: Tens of thousands of red threads have been passed through the needles.

chars.zh: 若干、多少（多音字：jī 几乎）。

chars.en: measure word for long thin things

background.zh: 林杰是唐代少年才子，此诗描写七夕乞巧的民俗。
background.en: Lin Jie was a Tang child prodigy; the poem depicts the Qixi custom of begging for skill.

culture.zh: 七夕传说牛郎织女鹊桥相会，妇女对月穿针向织女乞求心灵手巧。
culture.en: On Qixi the Cowherd and Weaving Maid meet on the magpie bridge, and women thread needles by moonlight to beg the Maid for nimble hands.

rhetoric.zh: 由神话写到人间，以“几万条”夸张渲染乞巧的盛况。
rhetoric.en: It moves from myth to the human world, using the hyperbole of 'tens of thousands of threads' to convey the festive scene.

sandhi.zh: "乞"在上声"巧"前变读阳平（第二声）：qǐ→qí。
sandhi.en: 乞 comes before the third-tone 巧, so it is read in second tone: qǐ → qí.

sandhi.zh: "看"是去声，在去声"碧"前读"半去"（调值53），拼音不变：kàn。
sandhi.en: 看 (fourth tone) is shortened to a half-fourth tone (pitch 53) before the fourth-tone 碧; the written pinyin stays kàn.

sandhi.zh: "女"是上声，在非上声"渡"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：nǚ。
sandhi.en: 女 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 渡; the written pinyin stays nǚ.

sandhi.zh: "乞"在上声"巧"前变读阳平（第二声）：qǐ→qí。
sandhi.en: 乞 comes before the third-tone 巧, so it is read in second tone: qǐ → qí.

sandhi.zh: "巧"是上声，在非上声"望"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：qiǎo。
sandhi.en: 巧 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 望; the written pinyin stays qiǎo.

sandhi.zh: "几"是上声，在非上声"万"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：jǐ。
sandhi.en: 几 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 万; the written pinyin stays jǐ.

lines.pinyin: sǐ qù yuán zhī wàn shì kōng
lines.zh: 我本来就知道，人死之后一切都成空，
lines.en: I always knew that once dead, all things turn to nothing,

lines.pinyin: dàn bēi bú jiàn jiǔ zhōu tóng
lines.zh: 只是悲伤不能亲眼看到国家的统一。
lines.en: yet I grieve only that I cannot see the realm reunited.

lines.pinyin: wáng shī běi dìng zhōng yuán rì
lines.zh: 等到朝廷的军队向北收复中原的那一天，
lines.en: On the day the royal army marches north and pacifies the Central Plains,

lines.pinyin: jiā jì wú wàng gào nǎi wēng
lines.zh: 你们家祭时千万别忘了把这消息告诉你们的父亲。
lines.en: at the family sacrifice, do not forget to tell your old father.

chars.zh: 空、虚无（多音字：kòng 空闲）。
古指中国全境，九州即全国。
中间，此指中原（多音字：zhòng 击中）。
老人、父亲，此指诗人自己。

background.zh: 这是陆游临终时写给儿子的绝笔，时南宋偏安，中原沦陷于金。
background.en: Lu You's deathbed poem to his sons, written when the Southern Song had lost the Central Plains to the Jin.

culture.zh: “家祭”是旧时在家中祭奠祖先的礼俗，诗人嘱咐儿子告祭于他。
culture.en: The 'family sacrifice' was the custom of honoring ancestors at home; the poet asks his sons to report the news to him there.

rhetoric.zh: 以叮嘱遗言的口吻直抒胸臆，临死仍念国家统一，情感深沉。
rhetoric.en: A direct, testamentary outpouring of feeling: even in death he longs for reunification, conveying profound patriotism.

sandhi.zh: "死"是上声，在非上声"去"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：sǐ。
sandhi.en: 死 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 去; the written pinyin stays sǐ.

sandhi.zh: "万"是去声，在去声"事"前读"半去"（调值53），拼音不变：wàn。
sandhi.en: 万 (fourth tone) is shortened to a half-fourth tone (pitch 53) before the fourth-tone 事; the written pinyin stays wàn.

sandhi.zh: "不"在去声"见"前变读阳平（第二声）：bù→bú。
sandhi.en: 不 before the fourth-tone 见 changes to second tone: bù → bú.

sandhi.zh: "九"是上声，在非上声"州"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：jiǔ。
sandhi.en: 九 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 州; the written pinyin stays jiǔ.

sandhi.zh: "北"是上声，在非上声"定"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：běi。
sandhi.en: 北 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 定; the written pinyin stays běi.

sandhi.zh: "乃"是上声，在非上声"翁"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：nǎi。
sandhi.en: 乃 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 翁; the written pinyin stays nǎi.

poems.title: 题临安邸
poems.titleEn: Written on the Wall of an Inn at Lin'an
poems.author: 林升

lines.pinyin: shān wài qīng shān lóu wài lóu
lines.zh: 青山之外还有青山，高楼之外还有高楼。
lines.en: Green hills beyond green hills, towers beyond towers.

lines.pinyin: xī hú gē wǔ jǐ shí xiū
lines.zh: 西湖边上的歌舞享乐什么时候才能停止？
lines.en: When will the singing and dancing by West Lake ever cease?

lines.pinyin: nuǎn fēng xūn dé yóu rén zuì
lines.zh: 暖洋洋的风把游人吹得如痴如醉，
lines.en: The warm breeze lulls the revelers into a stupor,

lines.pinyin: zhí bǎ háng zhōu zuò biàn zhōu
lines.zh: 竟然把临时苟安的杭州当成了故都汴州。
lines.en: till they mistake Hangzhou for the old capital Bianzhou.

chars.zh: 助词，得（多音字：děi 必须；de 跑得快）。

background.zh: 北宋灭亡后，南宋偏安杭州（临安），统治者沉湎享乐，林升题诗于旅店墙壁讽刺。
background.en: After the Northern Song fell, the Southern Song court took refuge in Hangzhou and indulged in pleasure; Lin Sheng wrote this on an inn wall as satire.

culture.zh: “汴州”是北宋故都开封，与偏安的“杭州”对照，寄寓对收复故土的渴望。
culture.en: Bianzhou was the lost Northern Song capital; set against refuge-Hangzhou it voices longing to recover the homeland.

rhetoric.zh: 首句“山外青山楼外楼”以复沓句式渲染歌舞升平之盛；以反问“几时休”和反讽“直把杭州作汴州”尖锐批判统治者忘怀国耻。
rhetoric.en: The opening's repeated hills beyond hills, towers beyond towers conveys the endless revelry; a rhetorical question (when will it ever cease) and biting irony (mistaking Hangzhou for the old capital) condemn rulers who forget the national shame.

sandhi.zh: "舞"在上声"几"前变读阳平（第二声）：wǔ→wú。
sandhi.en: 舞 comes before the third-tone 几, so it is read in second tone: wǔ → wú.

sandhi.zh: "几"是上声，在非上声"时"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：jǐ。
sandhi.en: 几 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 时; the written pinyin stays jǐ.

sandhi.zh: "暖"是上声，在非上声"风"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：nuǎn。
sandhi.en: 暖 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 风; the written pinyin stays nuǎn.

sandhi.zh: "把"是上声，在非上声"杭"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：bǎ。
sandhi.en: 把 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 杭; the written pinyin stays bǎ.

sandhi.zh: "作"是去声，在去声"汴"前读"半去"（调值53），拼音不变：zuò。
sandhi.en: 作 (fourth tone) is shortened to a half-fourth tone (pitch 53) before the fourth-tone 汴; the written pinyin stays zuò.

lines.pinyin: jiǔ zhōu shēng qì shì fēng léi
lines.zh: 中国要重现勃勃生机，必须依靠像风雷一样的巨大力量。
lines.en: For China to regain its vigor, it must rely on forces like wind and thunder.

lines.pinyin: wàn mǎ qí yīn jiū kě āi
lines.zh: 可叹如今万马齐声沉默，这局面实在令人悲哀。
lines.en: Ten thousand horses standing mute—how truly lamentable.

lines.pinyin: wǒ quàn tiān gōng chóng dǒu sǒu
lines.zh: 我奉劝天帝重新振作精神起来，
lines.en: I urge the Lord of Heaven to rouse himself anew,

lines.pinyin: bù jū yì gé jiàng rén cái
lines.zh: 不要拘泥于固定的标准，多多降下各种人才。
lines.en: and send down talent without sticking to a single mold.

chars.zh: 沉默不语，此指马不嘶鸣。
对长者尊称，天公即天帝。
重新、再次（多音字：zhòng 重量）。
降下、赐予（多音字：xiáng 投降）。

background.zh: 己亥年（1839）龚自珍辞官南归，途中作诗三百一十五首，此为其一。
background.en: In the Jihai year (1839) Gong Zizhen resigned and journeyed south, writing 315 poems; this is one.

culture.zh: 诗作于清末国势衰微、思想沉闷之时，反映呼唤变革与人才的时代心声。
culture.en: Written in the late Qing decline, it voices the era's call for reform and fresh talent.

rhetoric.zh: 以“万马齐喑”比喻沉闷局面，借向天公进言抒发期盼变革、广纳人才的强烈愿望。
rhetoric.en: The metaphor 'ten thousand mute horses' depicts stagnation, while the appeal to Heaven voices a fervent wish for reform and open recruitment of talent.

sandhi.zh: "己"是上声，在非上声"亥"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：jǐ。
sandhi.en: 己 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 亥; the written pinyin stays jǐ.

sandhi.zh: "九"是上声，在非上声"州"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：jiǔ。
sandhi.en: 九 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 州; the written pinyin stays jiǔ.

sandhi.zh: "马"是上声，在非上声"齐"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：mǎ。
sandhi.en: 马 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 齐; the written pinyin stays mǎ.

sandhi.zh: "可"是上声，在非上声"哀"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：kě。
sandhi.en: 可 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 哀; the written pinyin stays kě.

sandhi.zh: "我"是上声，在非上声"劝"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：wǒ。
sandhi.en: 我 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 劝; the written pinyin stays wǒ.

sandhi.zh: "抖"在上声"擞"前变读阳平（第二声）：dǒu→dóu。
sandhi.en: 抖 comes before the third-tone 擞, so it is read in second tone: dǒu → dóu.

sandhi.zh: "一"在阴平/阳平/上声"格"前变读去声（第四声）：yī→yì。
sandhi.en: 一 before the (1st/2nd/3rd-tone) 格 changes to fourth tone: yī → yì.

lines.pinyin: kōng shān xīn yǔ hòu
lines.zh: 空旷的山中刚刚下过一场雨，
lines.en: After fresh rain over the empty mountains,

lines.pinyin: tiān qì wǎn lái qiū
lines.zh: 傍晚的天气更显出秋天的凉意。
lines.en: the evening air brings on the feel of autumn.

lines.pinyin: míng yuè sōng jiān zhào
lines.zh: 皎洁的月光透过松林间洒落下来，
lines.en: The bright moon shines among the pines,

lines.pinyin: qīng quán shí shàng liú
lines.zh: 清澈的泉水在山石上潺潺流淌。
lines.en: and clear spring water flows over the stones.

lines.pinyin: zhú xuān guī huàn nǚ
lines.zh: 竹林里传来喧笑，是洗衣的姑娘归来了，
lines.en: Bamboo rustles as the washing girls return,

lines.pinyin: lián dòng xià yú zhōu
lines.zh: 莲叶摇动，是顺流而下的渔船划过。
lines.en: lotus leaves stir as the fishing boats glide down.

lines.pinyin: suí yì chūn fāng xiē
lines.zh: 尽管春天的芳花已经凋谢，
lines.en: Let the fragrant blooms of spring fade as they will,

lines.pinyin: wáng sūn zì kě liú
lines.zh: 这秋色山居仍值得我久久留居。
lines.en: this is still a place where the noble wanderer may stay.

chars.zh: 空旷、寂静（多音字：kòng 空闲）。
中间、之间（多音字：jiàn 间隔）。
王孙，指贵族子弟，此为诗人自指。
王孙，指漫游山林的隐士。

background.zh: 王维隐居终南山辋川时所作，描写雨后秋山傍晚的清幽景象。
background.en: Written during Wang Wei's seclusion at Wangchuan in the Zhongnan Mountains, depicting an autumn evening after rain.

culture.zh: 尾句化用《楚辞》“王孙兮归来”，反其意而用，表达归隐山林之志。
culture.en: The closing line reverses a Chuci line about the wanderer returning, expressing a wish to remain in seclusion.

rhetoric.zh: 动静结合、以声衬静，描绘出“诗中有画”的山水意境。
rhetoric.en: Motion and stillness blend, sound sets off quiet, painting a picture-in-verse landscape.

sandhi.zh: "雨"是上声，在非上声"后"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：yǔ。
sandhi.en: 雨 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 后; the written pinyin stays yǔ.

sandhi.zh: "晚"是上声，在非上声"来"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：wǎn。
sandhi.en: 晚 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 来; the written pinyin stays wǎn.

sandhi.zh: "可"是上声，在非上声"留"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：kě。
sandhi.en: 可 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 留; the written pinyin stays kě.

lines.pinyin: yuè luò wū tí shuāng mǎn tiān
lines.zh: 月亮西沉，乌鸦啼叫，寒霜仿佛弥漫整个天空。
lines.en: The moon sets, crows caw, frost fills the sky.

lines.pinyin: jiāng fēng yú huǒ duì chóu mián
lines.zh: 江边的枫树和渔船的灯火，伴着满怀愁绪的我难以入眠。
lines.en: Riverside maples and fishing lamps face my sorrowful, sleepless self.

lines.pinyin: gū sū chéng wài hán shān sì
lines.zh: 姑苏城外的寒山寺，
lines.en: Beyond the walls of Gusu stands Hanshan Temple,

lines.pinyin: yè bàn zhōng shēng dào kè chuán
lines.zh: 半夜里悠悠的钟声传到了我乘坐的客船。
lines.en: and at midnight its bell reaches the traveler's boat.

chars.zh: 客人、旅客，客船即旅人之船。

background.zh: 张继客游途中夜泊枫桥，写下这首抒发旅愁的名作。
background.en: Zhang Ji moored by Maple Bridge while traveling and wrote this famous poem of a wanderer's sorrow.

culture.zh: 寒山寺在苏州城外，因此诗而名扬天下，至今夜半钟声仍为名景。
culture.en: Hanshan Temple outside Suzhou became famous through this poem; its midnight bell remains a noted scene.

rhetoric.zh: 通过月落、乌啼、钟声等景物渲染，以景写愁，情景交融。
rhetoric.en: Images of the setting moon, crows, and the bell evoke the traveler's sorrow, fusing scene and feeling.

sandhi.zh: "月"是去声，在去声"落"前读"半去"（调值53），拼音不变：yuè。
sandhi.en: 月 (fourth tone) is shortened to a half-fourth tone (pitch 53) before the fourth-tone 落; the written pinyin stays yuè.

sandhi.zh: "满"是上声，在非上声"天"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：mǎn。
sandhi.en: 满 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 天; the written pinyin stays mǎn.

sandhi.zh: "火"是上声，在非上声"对"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：huǒ。

poems.title: 长相思·山一程
poems.titlePinyin: cháng xiāng sī · shān yì chéng
poems.titleEn: Endless Longing: A Stretch of Hills
poems.author: 纳兰性德

lines.pinyin: shān yī chéng
lines.zh: 翻过一程又一程的山，
lines.en: A stretch of hills,

lines.pinyin: shuǐ yī chéng
lines.zh: 渡过一程又一程的水，
lines.en: a stretch of rivers,

lines.pinyin: shēn xiàng yú guān nà pàn xíng
lines.zh: 将士们的身躯正向着山海关那边行进，
lines.en: we press on toward the far side of Shanhai Pass,

lines.pinyin: yè shēn qiān zhàng dēng
lines.zh: 夜已深，无数营帐里仍亮着灯火。
lines.en: and deep in the night a thousand tents glow with lamplight.

lines.pinyin: fēng yī gēng
lines.zh: 风声呼啸了一更，
lines.en: Wind through one watch,

lines.pinyin: xuě yī gēng
lines.zh: 雪声纷飞了一更，
lines.en: snow through one watch,

lines.pinyin: guō suì xiāng xīn mèng bù chéng
lines.zh: 嘈杂的风雪声搅碎了思乡的心，连梦也做不成，
lines.en: their clamor shatters my homesick heart, no dream can form,

lines.pinyin: gù yuán wú cǐ shēng
lines.zh: 家乡可没有这样恼人的风雪声啊。
lines.en: for in my old home there was never such a sound.

chars.zh: 那、那边（多音字：nǎ 哪里）。
行走、行进（多音字：háng 行列）。
旧时夜间计时单位（多音字：gèng 更加）。

background.zh: 纳兰性德随康熙帝出关东巡，途中写下这首思乡之词。
background.en: Nalan Xingde wrote this homesick lyric while accompanying Emperor Kangxi on an expedition beyond the pass.

culture.zh: “长相思”是词牌名；“更”是古代夜间计时，一夜分五更。
culture.en: 'Changxiangsi' is a cipai (tune title); a 'geng' is a night watch, the night being divided into five.

rhetoric.zh: 上片写行程，下片写风雪，以叠句和“故园无此声”的对比抒写羁旅乡愁。
rhetoric.en: The first stanza traces the march, the second the storm; repetition and the contrast 'no such sound at home' convey a traveler's homesickness.

sandhi.en: 一 before the (1st/2nd/3rd-tone) 程 changes to fourth tone: yī → yì.

poems.title: 渔歌子·西塞山前
poems.titlePinyin: yú gē zǐ · xī sài shān qián
poems.author: 张志和

lines.pinyin: xī sài shān qián bái lù fēi
lines.zh: 西塞山前白鹭在自由地飞翔，
lines.en: Before Mount Xisai the white egrets fly,

lines.pinyin: táo huā liú shuǐ guì yú féi
lines.zh: 桃花盛开，江水流淌，鳜鱼正肥美。
lines.en: peach blossoms drift on the stream where the mandarin fish are plump.

lines.pinyin: qīng ruò lì
lines.zh: 戴着青色的箬竹斗笠，
lines.en: A green bamboo hat,

lines.pinyin: lǜ suō yī
lines.zh: 披着绿色的蓑草雨衣，
lines.en: a green straw raincoat,

lines.pinyin: xié fēng xì yǔ bù xū guī
lines.zh: 在斜风细雨中垂钓，悠然得不想回家。
lines.en: in slanting wind and fine rain, no need to go home.

chars.zh: 西塞山（多音字：sāi 堵塞；sè 阻塞）。
绿色（多音字：lù 鸭绿江）。
蓑衣，用草棕编成的雨衣。

background.zh: 张志和号烟波钓徒，弃官归隐江湖，此词写渔父逍遥之乐。
background.en: Zhang Zhihe, the 'Misty-Wave Angler,' gave up office to live by the rivers; the lyric celebrates a fisherman's carefree joy.

culture.zh: “渔歌子”是词牌名；箬笠、蓑衣是古代渔人雨具，是隐逸生活的象征。
culture.en: 'Yugezi' is a cipai; the bamboo hat and straw cloak, a fisherman's rain gear, symbolize the reclusive life.

rhetoric.zh: 色彩鲜明（白、青、绿）、动静相宜，勾勒出一幅恬淡的江南春景图。
rhetoric.en: Vivid colors and balanced motion and stillness paint a serene springtime scene of the Jiangnan region.

sandhi.zh: "子"是上声，在非上声"西"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：zǐ。
sandhi.en: 子 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 西; the written pinyin stays zǐ.

sandhi.zh: "水"是上声，在非上声"鳜"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：shuǐ。

lines.pinyin: bàn mǔ fāng táng yí jiàn kāi
lines.zh: 半亩大的方形池塘像一面镜子般展开，
lines.en: A half-acre square pond opens like a mirror,

lines.pinyin: tiān guāng yún yǐng gòng pái huái
lines.zh: 天空的光彩和云朵的影子一起在水面上荡漾移动。
lines.en: where sky-light and cloud-shadows drift and linger together.

lines.pinyin: wèn qú nǎ dé qīng rú xǔ
lines.zh: 要问这池水为什么能这样清澈？
lines.en: Ask it: how can it stay so clear?

lines.pinyin: wèi yǒu yuán tóu huó shuǐ lái
lines.zh: 正是因为有那源头不断送来活水。
lines.en: Because fresh water keeps flowing in from the source.

chars.en: (徘徊) to wander to and fro

chars.zh: 怎么、哪（多音字：nà 那个）。
能、能够（多音字：děi 必须；de 助词）。
活、流动的，活水即流动的水。

background.zh: 朱熹是南宋理学家，这首诗借观塘写读书治学的感悟。
background.en: Zhu Xi was a Southern Song Neo-Confucian; the poem uses a pond to express insights about learning.

culture.zh: 题为“观书有感”，是借景说理的哲理诗，常用于劝学。
culture.en: Titled 'Reflections on Reading,' it is a philosophical poem teaching through scenery, often cited to encourage study.

rhetoric.zh: 以方塘清澈源于活水作比喻，“问渠那得清如许”设问自答，说明只有不断学习吸收新知才能保持心智清明。
rhetoric.en: The clear pond fed by fresh water is a metaphor; ask it, how can it stay so clear poses a question the poem itself answers, showing that only constant learning keeps the mind clear and renewed.

sandhi.en: 有 comes before the third-tone 感, so it is read in second tone: yǒu → yóu.

poems.title: 四时田园杂兴（其三十一）
poems.titlePinyin: sì shí tián yuán zá xìng
poems.titleEn: Miscellaneous Rural Scenes Through the Seasons (No. 31)
poems.author: 范成大

lines.pinyin: zhòu chū yún tián yè jì má
lines.zh: 白天到田里去除草，晚上回家把麻搓成线。
lines.en: By day they weed the fields, by night they spin the hemp.

lines.pinyin: cūn zhuāng ér nǚ gè dāng jiā
lines.zh: 村里的男男女女各自挑起家庭的担子。
lines.en: The village men and women each run a household.

lines.pinyin: tóng sūn wèi jiě gòng gēng zhī
lines.zh: 小孩子还不懂得耕田织布的事，
lines.en: The young children cannot yet take part in plowing and weaving,

lines.pinyin: yě bàng sāng yīn xué zhòng guā
lines.zh: 却也在桑树的树荫下学着大人种瓜。
lines.en: yet under the mulberry shade they learn to plant the melons.

chars.zh: 当家，主持家务（多音字：dàng 适当）。
懂得（多音字：jiè 押解；xiè 浑身解数）。
从事、参与（多音字：gōng 提供）。

background.zh: 范成大晚年退居家乡，写下《四时田园杂兴》六十首，本篇是其中之一。
background.en: Written by Fan Chengda in retirement; one of sixty seasonal-rural poems.

culture.zh: 诗中再现了宋代江南农村男耕女织、孩童学农的劳动生活。
culture.en: It pictures the farming life of Southern Song rural families, men plowing and women weaving.

rhetoric.zh: 前两句写大人劳作，后两句写儿童学种瓜，以天真情趣作结。
rhetoric.en: Adults' toil sets up the charming image of children learning to farm.

sandhi.zh: "夜"是去声，在去声"绩"前读"半去"（调值53），拼音不变：yè。
sandhi.en: 夜 (fourth tone) is shortened to a half-fourth tone (pitch 53) before the fourth-tone 绩; the written pinyin stays yè.

sandhi.en: 女 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 各; the written pinyin stays nǚ.

sandhi.en: 解 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 供; the written pinyin stays jiě.

sandhi.zh: "也"是上声，在非上声"傍"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：yě。
sandhi.en: 也 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 傍; the written pinyin stays yě.

lines.pinyin: zhì zǐ jīn pén tuō xiǎo bīng
lines.zh: 清晨小孩子把金属盆里冻成的冰取了出来。
lines.en: At dawn the child pops the night's ice out of a metal basin.

lines.pinyin: cǎi sī chuān qǔ dàng yín zhēng
lines.zh: 用彩色丝线穿起来，当作银锣来敲。
lines.en: He threads it with coloured silk to use as a silver gong.

lines.pinyin: qiāo chéng yù qìng chuān lín xiǎng
lines.zh: 敲起来像玉磬的声音穿过树林回荡，
lines.en: Struck, it rings like a jade chime echoing through the woods,

lines.pinyin: hū zuò bō lí suì dì shēng
lines.zh: 忽然冰块落地，发出像玻璃摔碎的声音。
lines.en: then suddenly shatters like glass smashing on the ground.

background.zh: 杨万里以细腻笔触写儿童日常游戏，本诗描绘冬日孩童弄冰为戏。
background.en: Yang Wanli vividly captures a child's wintertime play with ice.

culture.zh: 玉磬是古代礼乐之器，诗人借以比拟冰声，富有雅趣。
culture.en: The jade chime was a ritual instrument; comparing ice to it adds elegance.

rhetoric.zh: 以银铮、玉磬、玻璃作比喻，写声音由清越到破碎，跌宕有致。
rhetoric.en: Similes of gong, chime and glass trace the sound from clear ring to sudden crash.

sandhi.en: 子 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 弄; the written pinyin stays zǐ.

lines.pinyin: cǎo mǎn chí táng shuǐ mǎn bēi
lines.zh: 绿草长满了池塘，池水涨满了堤岸。
lines.en: Grass fills the pond's edge, water brims at the bank.

lines.pinyin: shān xián luò rì jìn hán yī
lines.zh: 远山衔着将落的太阳，倒影浸在清冷的水波里。
lines.en: The hills hold the setting sun, soaked in cold ripples.

lines.pinyin: mù tóng guī qù héng niú bèi
lines.zh: 放牛的孩子横坐在牛背上回家，
lines.en: The cowherd rides home lying across the buffalo's back,

lines.pinyin: duǎn dí wú qiāng xìn kǒu chuī
lines.zh: 拿着短笛随便地吹，没有固定的曲调。
lines.en: blowing a short flute with no tune, just as he pleases.

chars.zh: 横着坐（多音字：hèng 蛮横）。

background.zh: 雷震是南宋诗人，此诗描绘乡村傍晚牧童归来的景象。
background.en: By Southern Song poet Lei Zhen, depicting a village at dusk as the cowherd returns.

culture.zh: 牧童横牛吹笛是中国田园诗画中常见的悠闲意象。
culture.en: The flute-playing cowherd on a buffalo is a classic image of pastoral ease.

rhetoric.zh: 首句“草满池塘水满陂”叠词对偶铺展水泽；次句“山衔落日”以拟人写山衔住斜阳；前两句写景，后两句写人，动静结合，洋溢闲适之趣。
rhetoric.en: The opening grass fills the pond, water brims the bank pairs a repeated verb in parallel form to spread the wetland scene; the next line personifies the hills holding the sun in their mouth; scene and figure, stillness and motion combine for a carefree mood.

sandhi.en: 草 comes before the third-tone 满, so it is read in second tone: cǎo → cáo.

sandhi.en: 满 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 池; the written pinyin stays mǎn.

sandhi.en: 水 comes before the third-tone 满, so it is read in second tone: shuǐ → shuí.

sandhi.en: 满 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 陂; the written pinyin stays mǎn.

lines.pinyin: qīng hǎi cháng yún àn xuě shān
lines.zh: 青海湖上空乌云密布，使雪山都显得暗淡。
lines.en: Long clouds over Qinghai darken the snowy mountains.

lines.pinyin: gū chéng yáo wàng yù mén guān
lines.zh: 守边的将士从孤城远远望着玉门关。
lines.en: From a lone fortress they gaze far toward Jade Gate Pass.

lines.pinyin: huáng shā bǎi zhàn chuān jīn jiǎ
lines.zh: 在黄沙弥漫的战场上身经百战，磨穿了铁甲。
lines.en: In a hundred desert battles their armour is worn through,

lines.pinyin: bù pò lóu lán zhōng bù huán
lines.zh: 不打败敌人，誓死也不回家乡。
lines.en: but till they crush Loulan, they vow never to return.

chars.zh: 回还、返回（多音字：hái 还有）。

background.zh: 王昌龄是盛唐著名边塞诗人，《从军行》组诗写戍边将士的生活，此为第四首。
background.en: By the great frontier poet Wang Changling; the fourth of his border-garrison series.

culture.zh: 玉门关、楼兰是汉唐西北边塞的标志，象征戍守与征战。
culture.en: Jade Gate Pass and Loulan symbolize the northwestern frontier and its wars.

rhetoric.zh: 前写边塞苍凉之景，“百战”夸张见征战之久；后以“不破……终不还”的反复誓言抒发将士保家卫国的豪情。
rhetoric.en: A bleak frontier scene gives way—the hyperbole of a hundred battles conveys the long campaign—to the soldier's resolute vow, repeated in not until... never return, voicing his resolve to defend the homeland.

sandhi.zh: "海"是上声，在非上声"长"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：hǎi。
sandhi.en: 海 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 长; the written pinyin stays hǎi.

sandhi.zh: "雪"是上声，在非上声"山"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：xuě。
sandhi.en: 雪 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 山; the written pinyin stays xuě.

sandhi.en: 百 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 战; the written pinyin stays bǎi.

sandhi.en: 不 before the fourth-tone 破 changes to second tone: bù → bú.

poems.title: 秋夜将晓出篱门迎凉有感
poems.titlePinyin: qiū yè jiāng xiǎo chū lí mén yíng liáng yǒu gǎn
poems.titleEn: Feelings on Going Out at the Hedge Gate to Greet the Cool Before Dawn on an Autumn Night
poems.author: 陆游

lines.pinyin: sān wàn lǐ hé dōng rù hǎi
lines.zh: 三万里长的黄河奔腾向东流入大海，
lines.en: The Yellow River runs thirty thousand li east into the sea,

lines.pinyin: wǔ qiān rèn yuè shàng mó tiān
lines.zh: 五千仞高的华山高耸直插云天。
lines.en: the five-thousand-ren peak rises to scrape the sky.

lines.pinyin: yí mín lèi jìn hú chén lǐ
lines.zh: 沦陷区的百姓在金人的统治下流尽了眼泪，
lines.en: The conquered folk have wept dry in the dust of the invaders,

lines.pinyin: nán wàng wáng shī yòu yī nián
lines.zh: 他们盼望南方朝廷的军队来收复失地，又过去了一年。
lines.en: gazing south for the royal army—another year gone by.

chars.zh: 遗留，此指沦陷区遗留的百姓。
古指北方民族，此指金兵。

background.zh: 陆游一生主张抗金，此诗写于晚年，抒发对沦陷区百姓和收复失地的忧念。
background.en: Lu You, lifelong advocate of resisting the Jin, wrote this in old age for the lost lands and their people.

culture.zh: 诗中黄河、华山象征祖国河山，遗民、王师反映南宋偏安的现实。
culture.en: The river and peak stand for the homeland; the imagery reflects the Southern Song's lost north.

rhetoric.zh: 前两句以夸张写山河壮阔，后两句转写遗民之痛，形成强烈对比。
rhetoric.en: Grand hyperbole of land yields to the grief of the abandoned people, a sharp contrast.

sandhi.zh: "晓"是上声，在非上声"出"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：xiǎo。
sandhi.en: 晓 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 出; the written pinyin stays xiǎo.

sandhi.en: 有 comes before the third-tone 感, so it is read in second tone: yǒu → yóu.

sandhi.en: 里 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 河; the written pinyin stays lǐ.

sandhi.en: 五 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 千; the written pinyin stays wǔ.

sandhi.en: 仞 (fourth tone) is shortened to a half-fourth tone (pitch 53) before the fourth-tone 岳; the written pinyin stays rèn.

sandhi.en: 泪 (fourth tone) is shortened to a half-fourth tone (pitch 53) before the fourth-tone 尽; the written pinyin stays lèi.

sandhi.en: 一 before the (1st/2nd/3rd-tone) 年 changes to fourth tone: yī → yì.

poems.title: 闻官军收河南河北
poems.titlePinyin: wén guān jūn shōu hé nán hé běi
poems.titleEn: On Hearing the Imperial Army Has Recovered Henan and Hebei
poems.author: 杜甫

lines.pinyin: jiàn wài hū chuán shōu jì běi
lines.zh: 剑门关以南忽然传来收复蓟北的消息。
lines.en: Beyond Sword Pass, sudden word: Jibei is retaken.

lines.pinyin: chū wén tì lèi mǎn yī cháng
lines.zh: 刚听到时，泪水洒满了衣裳。
lines.en: First hearing it, my tears soak my robes.

lines.pinyin: què kàn qī zǐ chóu hé zài
lines.zh: 回头看看妻子儿女，往日的忧愁不知去哪了。
lines.en: I turn to wife and children—where now is the grief?

lines.pinyin: màn juǎn shī shū xǐ yù kuáng
lines.zh: 随手卷起诗书，欢喜得简直要发狂。
lines.en: I roll up my books, wild with joy.

lines.pinyin: bái rì fàng gē xū zòng jiǔ
lines.zh: 白天里放声高歌，还要尽情饮酒。
lines.en: In broad day I sing aloud and drink my fill,

lines.pinyin: qīng chūn zuò bàn hǎo huán xiāng
lines.zh: 趁着春光正好，正适合结伴回归故乡。
lines.en: with spring as companion, fine for going home.

lines.pinyin: jí cóng bā xiá chuān wū xiá
lines.zh: 立刻就从巴峡穿过巫峡，
lines.en: At once from Ba Gorge through Wu Gorge,

lines.pinyin: biàn xià xiāng yáng xiàng luò yáng
lines.zh: 再顺流下到襄阳，直奔洛阳。
lines.en: then down to Xiangyang and on toward Luoyang.

chars.zh: 古指下身的裙裳（多音字：shang 衣裳口语）。
正好、适宜（多音字：hào 爱好）。

background.zh: 唐代安史之乱平定，杜甫听到官军收复失地的喜讯，欣喜若狂写下此诗，被称为他“生平第一快诗”。
background.en: On hearing the An Lushan rebellion crushed, Du Fu wrote this, called his happiest poem.

culture.zh: 诗中巴峡、巫峡、襄阳、洛阳串起返乡路线，反映诗人对故园的急切向往。
culture.en: The chain of place names maps the longed-for road home.

rhetoric.zh: 全诗以“喜”贯穿，“却看妻子愁何在”以反问写忧愁尽消，连用动作和地名，节奏明快，洋溢狂喜之情。
rhetoric.en: Driven by joy—I turn to my family, where now is the grief? asks a rhetorical question that shows sorrow utterly vanished—the poem strings together rapid verbs and place names, its pace quick, overflowing with elation.

poems.title: 黄鹤楼送孟浩然之广陵
poems.titlePinyin: huáng hè lóu sòng mèng hào rán zhī guǎng líng
poems.titleEn: Seeing Off Meng Haoran for Guangling at Yellow Crane Tower
poems.author: 李白

lines.pinyin: gù rén xī cí huáng hè lóu
lines.zh: 老朋友在西边的黄鹤楼向我告别，
lines.en: My old friend bids farewell west at Yellow Crane Tower,

lines.pinyin: yān huā sān yuè xià yáng zhōu
lines.zh: 在繁花似锦的三月顺流东下去扬州。
lines.en: and in flowery March goes down to Yangzhou.

lines.pinyin: gū fān yuǎn yǐng bì kōng jìn
lines.zh: 孤独的帆船渐行渐远，消失在碧蓝的天边，
lines.en: The lone sail's far shape fades into the blue sky,

lines.pinyin: wéi jiàn cháng jiāng tiān jì liú
lines.zh: 只看见长江浩浩荡荡地流向天边。
lines.en: and only the long river flows on to the horizon.

chars.zh: 长，长江（多音字：zhǎng 生长）。

background.zh: 李白在黄鹤楼送别好友孟浩然东游扬州，写下这首送别名作。
background.en: Li Bai wrote this seeing Meng Haoran off down to Yangzhou from Yellow Crane Tower.

culture.zh: 黄鹤楼是江南名楼，“烟花三月下扬州”成为描写江南春景的千古名句。
culture.en: Yellow Crane Tower is famed; the 'flowery March' line is a celebrated image of Jiangnan spring.

rhetoric.zh: 后两句以“孤帆”（借代指船）远去、江水东流的画面寄托无尽离情，含蓄深远。
rhetoric.en: The closing lines use the lone sail (metonymy for the boat) vanishing and the river flowing on to embody boundless parting feeling, restrained yet far-reaching.

sandhi.zh: "孟"是去声，在去声"浩"前读"半去"（调值53），拼音不变：mèng。
sandhi.en: 孟 (fourth tone) is shortened to a half-fourth tone (pitch 53) before the fourth-tone 浩; the written pinyin stays mèng.

sandhi.zh: "广"是上声，在非上声"陵"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：guǎng。
sandhi.en: 广 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 陵; the written pinyin stays guǎng.

sandhi.zh: "远"在上声"影"前变读阳平（第二声）：yuǎn→yuán。
sandhi.en: 远 comes before the third-tone 影, so it is read in second tone: yuǎn → yuán.

sandhi.zh: "影"是上声，在非上声"碧"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：yǐng。
sandhi.en: 影 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 碧; the written pinyin stays yǐng.

lines.pinyin: huáng hé yuǎn shàng bái yún jiān
lines.zh: 奔腾的黄河好像从遥远的白云间流来，
lines.en: The Yellow River climbs far up among white clouds,

lines.pinyin: yī piàn gū chéng wàn rèn shān
lines.zh: 一座孤零零的城池矗立在万仞高山之中。
lines.en: a single lone fortress amid mountains ten-thousand ren high.

lines.pinyin: qiāng dí hé xū yuàn yáng liǔ
lines.zh: 羌笛何必吹奏哀怨的《折杨柳》曲子呢，
lines.en: Why should the Qiang flute lament the willows?

lines.pinyin: chūn fēng bù dù yù mén guān
lines.zh: 和暖的春风本来就吹不到玉门关。
lines.en: The spring wind never crosses Jade Gate Pass.

background.zh: 《凉州词》是唐代乐府旧题，王之涣此篇是著名的边塞诗。
background.en: A classic Tang frontier poem set to the old 'Liangzhou' tune.

culture.zh: 古人折柳赠别，羌笛吹《折杨柳》寄托思乡之情；玉门关象征荒远边塞。
culture.en: Willow-snapping marked parting; the flute song and Jade Gate evoke frontier homesickness.

rhetoric.zh: 前两句以“万仞山”夸张写边塞壮阔孤寂之景，后两句用反问含蓄写戍卒思乡。
rhetoric.en: The opening exaggerates with mountains ten-thousand ren high to paint a vast, lonely scene, before a rhetorical question voices the soldiers' longing.

sandhi.zh: "远"是上声，在非上声"上"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：yuǎn。
sandhi.en: 远 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 上; the written pinyin stays yuǎn.

sandhi.en: 一 before the fourth-tone 片 changes to second tone: yī → yí.

sandhi.zh: "万"是去声，在去声"仞"前读"半去"（调值53），拼音不变：wàn。
sandhi.en: 万 (fourth tone) is shortened to a half-fourth tone (pitch 53) before the fourth-tone 仞; the written pinyin stays wàn.

sandhi.en: 不 before the fourth-tone 度 changes to second tone: bù → bú.

poems.title: 乡村四月
poems.titleEn: The Countryside in the Fourth Month
poems.author: 翁卷

lines.pinyin: lǜ biàn shān yuán bái mǎn chuān
lines.zh: 山陵和原野到处一片新绿，水田里满是白茫茫的水光。
lines.en: Green covers hill and plain, white fills the watered fields.

lines.pinyin: zǐ guī shēng lǐ yǔ rú yān
lines.zh: 在杜鹃鸟的啼叫声中，细雨蒙蒙像轻烟。
lines.en: Amid the cuckoo's call, the rain drifts like mist.

lines.pinyin: xiāng cūn sì yuè xián rén shǎo
lines.zh: 乡村的四月里很少有闲着的人，
lines.en: In the country's fourth month few people are idle,

lines.pinyin: cái liǎo cán sāng yòu chā tián
lines.zh: 刚刚忙完养蚕采桑，又要去插秧种田。
lines.en: just done with silkworms and mulberry, off to plant the rice.

chars.zh: 完结、做完（多音字：le 语气词）。

background.zh: 翁卷是南宋“永嘉四灵”之一，此诗描写江南农村初夏的繁忙景象。
background.en: By Weng Juan of the Southern Song; depicting busy early-summer farm life in Jiangnan.

culture.zh: 蚕桑、插秧是江南农事，子规啼鸣常与农时相连。
culture.en: Silkworm-raising and rice-planting were key Jiangnan tasks, marked by the cuckoo's call.

rhetoric.zh: 前两句写景色彩鲜明，后两句写人，突出农家的辛勤忙碌。
rhetoric.en: Vivid scenery is followed by busy farmers, highlighting their diligence.

sandhi.en: 四 (fourth tone) is shortened to a half-fourth tone (pitch 53) before the fourth-tone 月; the written pinyin stays sì.

sandhi.zh: "绿"是去声，在去声"遍"前读"半去"（调值53），拼音不变：lǜ。
sandhi.en: 绿 (fourth tone) is shortened to a half-fourth tone (pitch 53) before the fourth-tone 遍; the written pinyin stays lǜ.

sandhi.en: 满 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 川; the written pinyin stays mǎn.

sandhi.zh: "子"是上声，在非上声"规"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：zǐ。
sandhi.en: 子 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 规; the written pinyin stays zǐ.

sandhi.zh: "里"在上声"雨"前变读阳平（第二声）：lǐ→lí。
sandhi.en: 里 comes before the third-tone 雨, so it is read in second tone: lǐ → lí.

sandhi.zh: "雨"是上声，在非上声"如"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：yǔ。
sandhi.en: 雨 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 如; the written pinyin stays yǔ.

sandhi.zh: "四"是去声，在去声"月"前读"半去"（调值53），拼音不变：sì。
sandhi.en: 四 (fourth tone) is shortened to a half-fourth tone (pitch 53) before the fourth-tone 月; the written pinyin stays sì.

sandhi.zh: "了"是上声，在非上声"蚕"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：liǎo。
sandhi.en: 了 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 蚕; the written pinyin stays liǎo.

lines.pinyin: rén xián guì huā luò
lines.zh: 夜里十分清静，人也闲适，连桂花轻轻飘落都能察觉。
lines.en: In stillness, the osmanthus blossoms fall.

lines.pinyin: yè jìng chūn shān kōng
lines.zh: 春夜寂静，春山仿佛空无一物。
lines.en: The night is calm, the spring hills empty.

lines.pinyin: yuè chū jīng shān niǎo
lines.zh: 月亮升起，惊动了山中栖息的鸟儿，
lines.en: The moon rises, startling the mountain birds,

lines.pinyin: shí míng chūn jiàn zhōng
lines.zh: 它们时时在春日的山涧中啼鸣。
lines.en: that now and then sing in the spring ravine.

background.zh: 王维晚年隐居，写下许多清幽山水诗，《鸟鸣涧》是其代表。
background.en: Written in Wang Wei's reclusive years, a model of his serene landscape verse.

culture.zh: 王维诗中有画、画中有禅，诗歌体现以静写动的意境。
culture.en: Wang Wei's poems hold painting and Zen; here stillness reveals movement.

rhetoric.zh: 以花落、月出、鸟鸣等细微动静，反衬春夜山涧的清幽寂静。
rhetoric.en: Faint motions of falling petals and birdsong heighten the deep quiet.

sandhi.zh: "鸟"是上声，在非上声"鸣"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：niǎo。
sandhi.en: 鸟 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 鸣; the written pinyin stays niǎo.

sandhi.zh: "夜"是去声，在去声"静"前读"半去"（调值53），拼音不变：yè。
sandhi.en: 夜 (fourth tone) is shortened to a half-fourth tone (pitch 53) before the fourth-tone 静; the written pinyin stays yè.

lines.pinyin: cí mǔ shǒu zhōng xiàn
lines.zh: 慈爱的母亲手中拿着针线，
lines.en: The kind mother, thread in hand,

lines.pinyin: yóu zǐ shēn shàng yī
lines.zh: 为即将远行的孩子缝制身上的衣裳。
lines.en: sews the clothes for her departing son.

lines.pinyin: lín xíng mì mì féng
lines.zh: 临出发前她把衣服缝得密密实实，
lines.en: Before he leaves she stitches close and tight,

lines.pinyin: yì kǒng chí chí guī
lines.zh: 心里担心孩子迟迟不能回来。
lines.en: fearing he may be slow to return.

lines.pinyin: shéi yán cùn cǎo xīn
lines.zh: 谁说像小草那样微弱的孝心，
lines.en: Who says the heart of an inch-long blade of grass

lines.pinyin: bào dé sān chūn huī
lines.zh: 能报答得了像春天阳光般深厚的母爱呢？
lines.en: can repay the warmth of the whole spring sun?

chars.zh: 出行、远行（多音字：háng 行业）。
能够（多音字：de 助词；děi 必须）。

background.zh: 孟郊一生贫困，五十岁才得官，此诗写于赴任时，感念母亲缝衣相送。
background.en: The poor, late-rising official Meng Jiao wrote this recalling his mother sewing his clothes.

culture.zh: “临行密密缝”体现古代母亲为远行子女缝衣送别的深情。
culture.en: The tight stitching reflects a mother's love for a son setting out far away.

rhetoric.zh: 以“寸草心”与“三春晖”作比，反问点出子女难报母恩的主题。
rhetoric.en: Contrasting tiny grass with the spring sun, a rhetorical question shows love beyond repaying.

sandhi.zh: "子"是上声，在非上声"吟"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：zǐ。
sandhi.en: 子 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 吟; the written pinyin stays zǐ.

sandhi.zh: "母"在上声"手"前变读阳平（第二声）：mǔ→mú。
sandhi.en: 母 comes before the third-tone 手, so it is read in second tone: mǔ → mú.

sandhi.zh: "手"是上声，在非上声"中"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：shǒu。
sandhi.en: 手 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 中; the written pinyin stays shǒu.

sandhi.zh: "子"是上声，在非上声"身"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：zǐ。
sandhi.en: 子 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 身; the written pinyin stays zǐ.

sandhi.zh: "密"是去声，在去声"密"前读"半去"（调值53），拼音不变：mì。
sandhi.en: 密 (fourth tone) is shortened to a half-fourth tone (pitch 53) before the fourth-tone 密; the written pinyin stays mì.

sandhi.zh: "恐"是上声，在非上声"迟"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：kǒng。
sandhi.en: 恐 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 迟; the written pinyin stays kǒng.

sandhi.zh: "草"是上声，在非上声"心"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：cǎo。
sandhi.en: 草 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 心; the written pinyin stays cǎo.
